name: Whitesville Community
description_short: Member-owned credit union serving seven Kentucky counties with auto loans, savings accounts, and cooperative financial services since 1962.
description_long:
Whitesville Community Credit Union was established in April 1962 as St. Mary's Credit Union by 13 charter members seeking to create a member-owned cooperative for safe savings and affordable lending. In 1968, the organization expanded to serve the broader Whitesville community and rebranded as Whitesville Community Credit Union, Inc. Today it serves members across Daviess, Hancock, Henderson, Ohio, Webster, McLean, and Union counties in Kentucky. The credit union remains committed to its non-profit, member-focused mission.

Whitesville Community Credit Union offers auto loans starting at 4.75% APR, online banking access, and debit cards with ATM network access through NYCE, Cirrus, and Maestro networks. Members can access MasterCard-enabled ATMs and point-of-sale terminals. The institution provides share accounts and related deposit products typical of credit unions, with online banking capabilities for account management.

As a federally-insured credit union, Whitesville Community distinguishes itself through its multi-county service area across western Kentucky and its long operational history of over 60 years. The organization maintains transparent governance with an elected board of directors and supervisory committee. Its membership eligibility extends to anyone who lives, works, or worships in the seven designated counties, providing broader access than some smaller credit unions.

Prospective members should note that the website provides limited detail on the full product range, fee structures, or deposit rates. The organization operates traditional business hours (9am-4pm Monday-Thursday, 9am-5pm Friday) and closes for federal holidays, which may inconvenience members seeking extended accessibility. No information is available regarding minimum balance requirements, savings rates, or the complete loan product portfolio beyond auto financing.
services: Auto loans with rates starting at 4.75% APR
Debit cards with national ATM network access
ATM and point-of-sale terminal access via NYCE, Cirrus, and Maestro networks
Membership eligibility for seven-county service area
pros: Established 60+ year history serving Kentucky communities with stable, non-profit structure
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.75% APR
Wide geographic service area covering seven Kentucky counties
NCUA federal insurance protection for member deposits
Access to national ATM networks (NYCE, Cirrus, Maestro, MasterCard)
Online banking platform for remote account access and management
Member-owned cooperative structure returns profits to members rather than shareholders
cons: Limited online information about deposit rates, savings products, and fee schedules
Standard business hours (closes at 4pm most weekdays) may not suit all members
Restricted membership eligibility based on geographic location or employment
Website provides minimal detail on loan products beyond auto loans
No mention of digital banking features, mobile app, or advanced online services
best_for: Residents, workers, and community members in Daviess, Hancock, Henderson, Ohio, Webster, McLean, or Union counties seeking local credit union services
Auto buyers in western Kentucky looking for competitive rates and member-focused lending
Savers and depositors preferring non-profit, member-owned financial institutions over banks
diagnosis: Whitesville Community Credit Union is best suited for members in its seven-county Kentucky service area who prioritize competitive auto lending rates and a member-owned, non-profit financial institution. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal transparency about deposit rates, loan products beyond auto financing, and fee structures, requiring direct contact with the credit union to evaluate the full product range.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Whitesville Community — NCUA-insured credit union in Whitesville, KY. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
